description_long: This object is a classic semi-automatic pistol-style rifle, visually reminiscent of the Mauser C96, featuring a long, slender barrel and a rectangular receiver. The main body is constructed from dark metal, with a prominent trigger guard and a wooden grip that is ergonomically shaped for handheld use. The barrel is cylindrical and extends significantly from the receiver, giving the weapon a distinctive silhouette. The top of the receiver appears to have integrated iron sights for aiming, and there is no visible external magazine protruding from the bottom, suggesting an internal magazine design. The overall finish is a combination of glossy metal and polished wood, with the wood grain clearly visible on the grip. The object is compact compared to modern rifles, making it suitable for close-quarters or urban environments.
description: A classic pistol-style rifle with a long barrel, dark metal body, and polished wooden grip, featuring integrated iron sights and a compact, rectangular receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, rectangular receiver, and the wooden grip clearly.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the top of the wooden grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, receiver, and wooden grip from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and the end of the wooden grip.
